positive: Pop art style illustration of a large, smiling sun wearing sunglasses, surrounded by bold halftone dot patterns and comic book speech bubbles. Primary color palette (red, yellow, blue), thick black outlines, inspired by Roy Lichtenstein, high energy, suitable for a t-shirt graphic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, gradient, muted colors
